heading: Omitted
label: 410pp to 410pp–8 Omitted
notes: CodificationSections 410pp to 410pp–8 were omitted pursuant to section 410pp which terminated and the Zuni-Cibola National Historical Park was not established, because notice of acceptance of a leasehold interest in the Zuni Indian Reservation was not published during the required period of time.Section 410pp, , , ; , , , provided for establishment of the Zuni-Cibola National Historical Park effective on the date of publication by the Secretary of a notice of acceptance of a leasehold interest in the Zuni Indian Reservation pursuant to section 410pp–1 and provided for termination of this section six years after , unless prior to the end of that six-year period the Secretary had published such a notice.Pub. L. 100–567, § 2102 Stat. 2847Pub. L. 101–313, title III, § 302(1)104 Stat. 279Oct. 31, 1988June 27, 1990Oct. 31, 1988Section 410pp–1, , , ; , , ; , , , set forth conditions under which the Secretary could accept a leasehold offer from the Zuni Tribe, required preparation of a map of the park upon acceptance of the leasehold, and provided for boundary adjustments.Pub. L. 100–567, § 3102 Stat. 2847Pub. L. 101–313, title III, § 302(2)104 Stat. 279Pub. L. 103–437, § 6(k)108 Stat. 4586Oct. 31, 1988June 27, 1990Nov. 2, 1994Section 410pp–2, , , , related to management of the park.Pub. L. 100–567, § 4102 Stat. 2848Oct. 31, 1988Section 410pp–3, , , , required consistency with the general management plan for the park and protection from significant adverse effects on the park by any Federal agency with activities affecting the park.Pub. L. 100–567, § 5102 Stat. 2849Oct. 31, 1988Section 410pp–4, , , , established the Zuni-Cibola National Historical Park Advisory Commission and provided for the terms of its members, its expenses, Chair, and meetings, and applicability of the Federal Advisory Committee Act.Pub. L. 100–567, § 6102 Stat. 2849Oct. 31, 1988Section 410pp–5, , , ; , , , related to a general management plan for the park.Pub. L. 100–567, § 7102 Stat. 2850Pub. L. 103–437, § 6(k)108 Stat. 4586Oct. 31, 1988Nov. 2, 1994Section 410pp–6, , , ; , , , related to cultural and religious uses of the park.Pub. L. 100–567, § 8102 Stat. 2851Pub. L. 103–437, § 6(k)108 Stat. 4586Oct. 31, 1988Nov. 2, 1994Section 410pp–7, , , , set forth definitions.Pub. L. 100–567, § 9102 Stat. 2851Oct. 31, 1988Section 410pp–8, , , , authorized appropriations.Pub. L. 100–567, § 11102 Stat. 2852Oct. 31, 1988

Short Titleprovided that , which enacted this subchapter and amended , could be cited as the “Zuni-Cibola National Historical Park Establishment Act of 1988”.Section 1 of Pub. L. 100–567Pub. L. 100–567section 460uu–12 of this title
